# Flutter App Feature

**Type:** feature
**Project:** test-project
**Platform:** flutter
**Status:** planning
**Created:** 2026-03-31

## Problem

This is a test PRD with a free-form platform value for validation testing.

## Goal

Verify that PRD validation accepts non-legacy platform values like flutter.

## User Stories

- As a developer, I want to use any platform string so that PRDX works with any tech stack

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] PRD with flutter platform passes validation
- [ ] Free-form platform values are accepted

## Scope

### Included
- Test free-form platform validation

### Excluded
- Actual implementation

## Approach

Use this PRD as a fixture for testing free-form platform values.

## Risks & Considerations

- None - this is a test fixture
